job_summary: A Lead CRA supervises a team of CRAs, ensuring consistent monitoring quality across sites and acting as the primary liaison between the project team and monitoring staff.
key_responsibilities: Review monitoring reports for quality and accuracy
Act as escalation point for site issues
Coordinate with Clinical Trial Managers and sponsors
career_path: Lead CRA → Clinical Trial Manager → Project Manager
skills_required: act as escalation point for site issues
coordinate with clinical trial managers and sponsors
review monitoring reports for quality and accuracy
